name: restai
description: RESTai is an AIaaS (AI as a Service) open-source platform. Supports many public and local LLM suported by Ollama/vLLM/etc. Precise embeddings usage, tuning, analytics etc. Built-in image/audio generation with dynamic loading generators. Live chat deployment. Built-in block based graphical language. Prompt versioning and much more...
summaryZh: RESTai is an AIaaS (AI as a Service) open-source platform. Supports many public and local LLM suported by Ollama/vLLM/etc. Precise embeddings usage, tuning, analytics etc. Built-in image/audio generation with dynamic loading generators. Live chat deployment. Built-in block based graphical language. Prompt versioning and much more... 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。
